name: wxcode/admin-relay-helpdesk
title: Relay Helpdesk Admin
description: Friendly light-mode helpdesk operations dashboard — left inbox sidebar, topbar with search and assignee filter, 4 KPI cards (open tickets, avg first response, SLA compliance, CSAT), SLA-by-priority bar set, ticket queue table, and team load panel. Accent violet with green/amber/red status semantics.

query.en: Build me a helpdesk admin dashboard — left inbox sidebar, topbar with search and assignee filter, 4 KPI cards (open tickets, first response time, SLA compliance, CSAT), SLA priority bars, ticket queue table with priority and status pills, and a team load panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a helpdesk admin dashboard — left inbox sidebar, topbar with search and assignee filter, 4 KPI cards (open tickets, first response time, SLA compliance, CSAT), SLA priority bars, ticket queue table with priority and status pills, and a team load panel.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
